input: The spec lab prompts should force independent candidates, adversarial critique, consensus, red team, and a testable Definition of Done.
Implementation prompts should bias agents to extend SwiftAIBoilerplatePro instead of rebuilding auth, payments, AI, storage, networking, localization, settings, or design system.
Quality prompts should require macOS Xcode evidence, strict Swift lint/format/static checks, sensitive-value scanning, Appium/XCUITest exploratory clicking, and release string audits.
Design research prompts may use Mobbin credential env vars but should not leak credentials, clone screens, or copy assets.
